items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #1' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior regarding rate limiting on public pages. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. As such, the validation is inconclusive, as there is no clear evidence to support the success or failure of the scenario validation.
